ocr.text: In the fiscal year 2024, Block Inc exhibited significant financial metrics, with a P/E Ratio of 12.5, a Current Ratio of 1.8, a
Debt/Equity ratio of 0.5, a Return on Equity (ROE) of 15%, a Gross Margin of 30%, a Net Margin of 10%, a Quick Ratio of
1.0, an Operating Margin of 20%, a Return on Assets of 5%, a Liquidity Ratio of 3.0, and an Efficiency Ratio of 70%. For
Q1FY24, the P/E Ratio rose to 13.0, with a Current Ratio of 1.9 and a Debt/Equity of 0.6; ROE was 16%, Gross Margin 32%,
Net Margin 11%, Quick Ratio 1.1, Operating Margin 21%, Return on Assets 6%, Liquidity Ratio 3.5, and Efficiency Ratio

Q3FY24 saw a P/E Ratio of 15.0, with a Current Ratio of 2.1, Debt/Equity of 0.8, ROE of 18%, Gross Margin 34%, Net Margin
13%, Quick Ratio 1.3, Operating Margin 23%, Return on Assets 8%, Liquidity Ratio 4.5, and Efficiency Ratio 78%. In
Q4FY24, the metrics reached a P/E Ratio of 16.0, Current Ratio of 2.2, Debt/Equity of 0.9, ROE of 19%, Gross Margin 35%,
Net Margin 14%, Quick Ratio 1.4, Operating Margin 24%, Return on Assets 9%, Liquidity Ratio 5.0, and Efficiency Ratio
76%. The total customer acquisition metrics in Q1 included 15,000 New Customers, with a Customer Retention Rate of 85%,
Marketing Spend of £500K, and Customer Lifetime Value of £1.5M; Q2 showed 20,000 New Customers at an 83% retention
rate with a £600K marketing spend. In Q3, there were 22,000 New Customers with a £750K marketing spend and a 75%
retention rate, while Q4 reported 25,000 New Customers with a £1.0M marketing spend and a retention rate of 78%. The
Annual Summary indicated a Total New Customers figure of 70,000, an Average Retention Rate of 80%, Total Marketing
Spend of £4.6M, and Total Customer Value of £10.0M, with a Customer Feedback Score of 4.5/5, a Net Promoter Score of 60,
Customer Satisfaction Rate of 90%, and a Customer Churn Rate of 15%. Strategic Insights revealed a Conversion Rate of 12%,
Cost Per Acquisition of £30, and highlighted Retention Strategies including Social Media, Loyalty Programs, and Email
Campaigns at 18%. Additional channels included Referral Programs, Webinars, and Incentives with respective values of £25,
